title: Zimmer Biomet: Procedural Volumes Normalizing, Rate Buy
text: Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. reported net sales of $1.67Bn tightened by ~90bps YoY, but reported in constant currency terms, was up 500bps from last year. There was a strong recovery in orthopedic end-markets, with procedural volumes reverting to pre-pandemic ranges.

title: Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. (ZBH) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:ZBH ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call November 2, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Keri Mattox - Senior Vice President, Chief Communications & Administration Officer Bryan Hanson - Chairman, President & Chief Executive Officer Suky Upadhyay - Executive Vice President & Chief Financial Officer Ivan Tornos - Chief Operating Officer Conference Call Participants Shagun Singh - RBC Steven Lichtman - Oppenheimer & Company Vijay Kumar - Evercore ISI Travis Steed - Bank of America Robbie Marcus - JPMorgan Joanne Wuensch - Citibank Richard Newitter - Truist Securities Jeff Johnson - Baird Matthew O'Brien - Piper Sandler Operator Good morning, ladies and gentlemen and welcome to the Zimmer Biomet Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. [Operator Instructions] As a reminder, this conference is being recorded today, November 2, 2022.

title: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) Q3 Earnings Beat, Gross Margin Falls
text: Each of Zimmer Biomet's (ZBH) geographic segments and product divisions barring S.E.T. and "Other" record year-over-year sales growth at CER.

title: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) Surpasses Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Zimmer (ZBH) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 1.28% and 2.39%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
